# RDS Provisioning — Discovery Notes
# Auto-generated by B5-prov prompt on 2026-04-22

## VPC selected
VPC_ID: vpc-048ee32658b49e0a0
VPC_NAME: aria-platform-vpc
REASON: Contains the overwatch-platform ECS cluster (aria-console service).
  Both ECS subnets (subnet-0636e59cf68ff3844, subnet-0797dba8499525215)
  are in this VPC. Co-locating RDS here means no cross-VPC routing.

## Subnets selected (private, 2 AZs)
SUBNET_A: subnet-0797dba8499525215  (us-east-1a, 10.100.10.0/24, aria-platform-private-1a)
SUBNET_B: subnet-0636e59cf68ff3844  (us-east-1b, 10.100.11.0/24, aria-platform-private-1b)

## ECS service security group (ingress source)
ECS_SG_ID: sg-075797efad9ec368d

## Deploy command (after Ian reviews this file)
```bash
aws cloudformation deploy \
  --stack-name nexus-ontology-postgres \
  --template-file infra/rds-ontology-postgres.yaml \
  --parameter-overrides \
    VpcId=vpc-048ee32658b49e0a0 \
    PrivateSubnetA=subnet-0797dba8499525215 \
    PrivateSubnetB=subnet-0636e59cf68ff3844 \
    EcsSecurityGroupId=sg-075797efad9ec368d \
  --region us-east-1
```
